## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt`, `cargo clippy -- -D warnings`, `cargo nextest run` all pass locally
- [ ] New behavior covered by a `tests/cases/*.lox` snapshot (or explain why not)
- [ ] No `todo!()` left behind that wasn't there before
